rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CYRIL E. SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Resignation Of Representative Of Trustee And To Appoint Successor Representative Of Trustee (Probate Code 17200)
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/22/18. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 2 weeks prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF IBRAHIM MICHAEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner requests admission of lost will. She states that the presumption of revocation under Probate Code §6124 does not arise as the will was "inadvertently lost since the date of death of decedent". Court to determine whether the will should be admitted. 2) Notice has not been properly published, as: 1) it does not indicate that an amended petition was filed; and 2) it does not state that Petitioner is requesting admission of a lost will (Local Rule 14.29). Petitioner requests that no further publication be required as a good faith attempt to comply has been made, pursuant to Probate Code §8122. However, it appears that Probate Code §8122 addresses the sufficiency of the newspaper, not the content of the notice. 3) Courtesy copy of the "Second Supplement" filed on 12/21/17 and Amended Petition filed on 12/11/17 have not been delivered, as required under Local Rule 2.11T and 14.6C.
